mapper.sql: review_id, reservation_id, user_id, store_id, overall_rating, food_rating, service_rating, environment_rating, cat_interaction_rating, content, images, reply, reply_at, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from public.reviews
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into public.reviews (review_id, reservation_id, user_id, store_id, overall_rating, food_rating, service_rating, environment_rating, cat_interaction_rating, content, images, reply, reply_at, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{reviewId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{overallRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{foodRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{serviceRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{environmentRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{catInteractionRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{images,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{reply,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into public.reviews
review_id,
reservation_id,
user_id,
store_id,
overall_rating,
food_rating,
service_rating,
environment_rating,
cat_interaction_rating,
content,
images,
reply,
reply_at,
status,
created_at,
updated_at,
#{reviewId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{overallRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{foodRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update public.reviews
review_id = #{row.reviewId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reservation_id = #{row.reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
store_id = #{row.storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
overall_rating = #{row.overallRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
food_rating = #{row.foodRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
service_rating = #{row.serviceRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
environment_rating = #{row.environmentRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cat_interaction_rating = #{row.catInteractionRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
content = #{row.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
images = #{row.images,jdbcType=OTHER},
reply = #{row.reply,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_at = #{row.replyAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update public.reviews set review_id = #{row.reviewId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, reservation_id = #{row.reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, store_id = #{row.storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, overall_rating = #{row.overallRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, food_rating = #{row.foodRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, service_rating = #{row.serviceRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, environment_rating = #{row.environmentRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cat_interaction_rating = #{row.catInteractionRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, content = #{row.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, images = #{row.images,jdbcType=OTHER}, reply = #{row.reply,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_at = #{row.replyAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update public.reviews
reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
overall_rating = #{overallRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
food_rating = #{foodRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
service_rating = #{serviceRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
environment_rating = #{environmentRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cat_interaction_rating = #{catInteractionRating,jdbcType=INTEGER},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
images = #{images,jdbcType=OTHER},
reply = #{reply,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_at = #{replyAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where review_id = #{reviewId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update public.reviews set reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, overall_rating = #{overallRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, food_rating = #{foodRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, service_rating = #{serviceRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, environment_rating = #{environmentRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cat_interaction_rating = #{catInteractionRating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, images = #{images,jdbcType=OTHER}, reply = #{reply,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_at = #{replyAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where review_id = #{reviewId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
